2604.08184.title: AT-ADD: All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection Challenge Evaluation Plan
2604.08184.paper_summary: The rapid advancement of Audio Large Language Models (ALLMs) has enabled cost-effective, high-fidelity generation and manipulation of both speech and non-speech audio, including sound effects, singing voices, and music. While these capabilities foster creativity and content production, they also introduce significant security and trust challenges, as realistic audio deepfakes can now be generated and disseminated at scale. Existing audio deepfake detection (ADD) countermeasures (CMs) and benchmarks, however, remain largely speech-centric, often relying on speech-specific artifacts and exhibiting limited robustness to real-world distortions, as well as restricted generalization to heterogeneous audio types and emerging spoofing techniques. To address these gaps, we propose the All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection (AT-ADD) Grand Challenge for ACM Multimedia 2026, designed to bridge controlled academic evaluation with practical multimedia forensics. AT-ADD comprises two tracks: (1) Robust Speech Deepfake Detection, which evaluates detectors under real-world scenarios and against unseen, state-of-the-art speech generation methods; and (2) All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection, which extends detection beyond speech to diverse, unknown audio types and promotes type-agnostic generalization across speech, sound, singing, and music. By providing standardized datasets, rigorous evaluation protocols, and reproducible baselines, AT-ADD aims to accelerate the development of robust and generalizable audio forensic technologies, supporting secure communication, reliable media verification, and responsible governance in an era of pervasive synthetic audio.
2604.08184.paper_summary_zh: 音頻大型語言模型（ALLMs）的快速進步使得成本效益高、音質優良的語音和非語音音頻生成與操作成為可能，包括音效、歌聲和音樂。雖然這些能力促進了創造力和內容生產，但它們也帶來了重大的安全和信任挑戰，因為現實的音頻深偽技術現在可以大規模生成和傳播。然而，現有的音頻深偽檢測（ADD）對策（CMs）和基準測試仍然主要集中於語音，通常依賴於語音特定的工件，並且對現實世界的失真表現出有限的穩健性，以及對異質音頻類型和新興欺騙技術的泛化能力有限。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了針對ACM Multimedia 2026的全類型音頻深偽檢測（AT-ADD）大挑戰，旨在將受控的學術評估與實際的多媒體取證相結合。AT-ADD包含兩個賽道：（1）穩健的語音深偽檢測，評估檢測器在現實世界場景中的表現，以及對未見過的最先進語音生成方法的檢測；（2）全類型音頻深偽檢測，將檢測擴展到多樣的未知音頻類型，並促進跨語音、聲音、歌唱和音樂的類型無關泛化。通過提供標準化數據集、嚴謹的評估協議和可重現的基準，AT-ADD旨在加速穩健且可泛化的音頻取證技術的發展，支持安全通信、可靠的媒體驗證和在合成音頻普遍存在的時代中負責任的治理。
2604.08184.author: Yuankun Xie et.al.
2604.08184.authors: Yuankun Xie, Haonan Cheng, Jiayi Zhou, Xiaoxuan Guo, Tao Wang, Jian Liu, Weiqiang Wang, Ruibo Fu, Xiaopeng Wang, Hengyan Huang, Xiaoying Huang, Long Ye, Guangtao Zhai
